Row: 2454 _id=2845, thread_id=489, address=+18007267864, person=NULL, date=1770946039807, date_sent=1770946004000, protocol=0, read=1, status=-1, type=1, reply_path_present=0, subject=proto:CjoKImNvbS5nb29nbGUuYW5kcm9pZC5hcHBzLm1lc3NhZ2luZy4SFCIAKhAT5wGREvlMYYkUJfEhCyPt, body=To restore a backup on a Samsung Galaxy phone, you have several options depending on where your data was saved. The main methods are Samsung Cloud, Smart Switch, and Google Account.

Restore via Samsung Cloud
Open Settings → Accounts and backup → Samsung Cloud.

Tap Restore data.

Select the device backup you want to restore.

Choose the data types (apps, contacts, messages, settings, etc.).

Tap Restore and wait for the process to complete.

Restore via Smart Switch
Install Smart Switch on both your old and new Samsung devices (or on a PC/Mac).

Connect devices via cable or Wi-Fi.

On the new phone, open Smart Switch → Receive data → choose source (Galaxy/Android/PC).

Select the backup and tap Restore.

Restore via Google Account
Open Settings → Google → Backup.

 Faith is a catalyst that unlocks supernatural power needed for miracles. Hebrews 11:1 -2

There are several faith actions that provoke the release of miracles. Among these are the following:

(a) Regular worship - Puts God above circumstances ( Psm 90, Rev 4:10 - 11, 5:8 - 10)

(b) Forgiveness - U forgiveness is a major hindrance to reception of miracles (John 3:12 - 22, Eph 4:32)

(c ) Obedience - Listen to instructions from God & obey them. A willing heart that follows God's command is more valuable to God than religious rituals or sacrifices ( 1Sam 15:22, 1Sam 13:14)

(d) Confess the Word - Speak and meditate on scriptures related to what you are expecting (Matt 17:20)
